---
name: Feature Request
about: Propose a new feature, integration, or model from the AIKosh registry.
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

### Target Application
Which application does this enhancement apply to?
- [ ] Kisan Voice AI
- [ ] PinAI
- [ ] DocPatram
- [ ] VaadVivaad
- [ ] HindiDiff
- [ ] Ayojit Core (Auth/Billing)

### Problem Description
A clear and concise description of the problem. (e.g., "Citizens need template X in DocPatram because...")

### Proposed Solution
A clear description of what you want to happen and how it uses open models or datasets.

### AIKosh Resource Link
If the feature relies on a new model or dataset from AIKosh, provide the direct URL (e.g., `https://aikosh.indiaai.gov.in/...`).

### Alternative Approaches Considered
Any alternative solutions you've considered.
